title: Better Item Names
description: Simple Texture Pack which enhances item names by making them use the corresponding blocks texture (English US REQUIRED TO CHOOSE AS THE LANGUAGE)
body:
![BetterItemNames](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/U8uEEI9Q?label=ED%20Downloads:)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Wont update unless Minecraft switches on Major updates again!

## A texture pack to make item name colors match the item's color!

## ❗READ BEFORE USING❗
_Compatible with most other packs which alter language files(has to be placed as the last to not alter anything)_

**I will not do every single items FULL NAME(for example copper states) for pretty obvious reasons**

**I will also NOT edit other languages for also pretty obvious reasons**



<details>
<summary>Unfixable Stuff</summary>

```
Searchers like the recipe book or the creative search are NOT working due to how they and the pack work (by using stuff in the lang file)
```

</details>




[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) is currently(and probably forever) incompatible for the same reason as other mods are incompatible(because it uses the lang file,duh)

![jade2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472dfeb68c4628ca635cacc1d83bef500af09abd_0.webp)

![jadeincompatible2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a00f95ff02cf990a7969c0b531c0a01d380671e_0.webp)
